title: Internal error in V3Param.cpp: Could not find array index in unlinked text
body:
I'm trying to compile a file that has a generated array of interfaces, but I get the following error with Verilator 4.216

```terminal
$ verilator -V
Verilator 4.216 2021-12-05 rev UNKNOWN.REV

Copyright 2003-2021 by Wilson Snyder.  Verilator is free software; you can
redistribute it and/or modify the Verilator internals under the terms of
either the GNU Lesser General Public License Version 3 or the Perl Artistic
License Version 2.0.

See https://verilator.org for documentation

Summary of configuration:
  Compiled in defaults if not in environment:
    SYSTEMC            =
    SYSTEMC_ARCH       =
    SYSTEMC_INCLUDE    =
    SYSTEMC_LIBDIR     =
    VERILATOR_ROOT     = /usr/share/verilator
    SystemC system-wide = 1

Environment:
    MAKE               =
    PERL               =
    SYSTEMC            =
    SYSTEMC_ARCH       =
    SYSTEMC_INCLUDE    =
    SYSTEMC_LIBDIR     =
    VERILATOR_ROOT     =
    VERILATOR_BIN      =

Features (based on environment or compiled-in support):
    SystemC found      = 1
$ make
rm -rf *.log *.s *.hex *.dis *.tbl irun* vcs* simv* *.map \
       verilator* *.exe obj* *.o ucli.key vc_hdrs.h csrc \
	   *.csv work dataset.asdb library.cfg
verilator --cc -Wall --assert --build -j -CFLAGS  common_defines.vh include/noc_types.sv \
	-Isrc \
	-f tools/flist sim/tb_noc.sv \
    --top tb_noc --autoflush
%Error: Internal Error: src/mesh.sv:77:70: ../V3Param.cpp:1060: Could not find array index in unlinked text: 'west_down__BRA__0__KET__' for node: CELLARRAYREF 0x55b626649330 <e5907#> {i77cs}  ports_up__Viftop
                                         : ... In instance tb_noc.mesh
   77 |                                  .down(nodes_h[i].nodes_w[j].ports_up[EAST]),
      |                                                                      ^
make: *** [Makefile:18: verilator-build] Error 1
```

You can see the file that's causing the error here:
https://github.com/daviddavo/tfg_poc_noc/blob/07caa05b6ea06983e252be1e97a397127cb7348f/src/mesh.sv#L47-L86

```systemverilog
   generate
      genvar          i, j;
      
      // Generating nodes
      // TODO: Flatten into one array
      for ( i = 0; i < MESH_HEIGHT; i++ ) begin: nodes_h
         for ( j = 0; j < MESH_WIDTH; j++ ) begin: nodes_w
            // TODO: Use `NODE_PORTS
            node_port ports_up[4]();
            node_port ports_down[4]();
            
            node #(
                   .X(i+1),
                   .Y(j+1),
                   .X_EDGE(MESH_HEIGHT),
                   .Y_EDGE(MESH_WIDTH)
                   ) node (
                           .clk(clk),
                           .rst(rst),
                           .ports_up(ports_up),
                           .ports_down(ports_down)
                           );
         end
      end
      
      // Connects node to next node horizontally
      for ( i = 0; i < MESH_HEIGHT; i++) begin
         for ( j = 0; j < MESH_WIDTH-1; j++) begin
            // East to West
            node_link east2west (
                                 .down(nodes_h[i].nodes_w[j].ports_up[EAST]), // <- This line
                                 .up(nodes_h[i].nodes_w[j+1].ports_down[WEST])
                                 );
            // West to East
            node_link west2east (
                                .down(nodes_h[i].nodes_w[j+1].ports_up[WEST]),
                                .up(nodes_h[i].nodes_w[j].ports_down[EAST])
                                );
         end
      end
```
